calendar.matters:
Hearing On Motion To Set Aside Court Judgment.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Christopher J. Harney's Motion to Set Aside the Default entered July 9, 2008 & the Court Judgment entered September 25, 2008.
Garret Murai, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Eric Anderson Incorporated, a California Corporation, dba Five Star Fixtures & Solid Surface.
Kevin P. Greenquist, Esq. appeared for defendant Christopher J. Harney, who was not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendant Christopher J. Harney's motion, and the Default entered July 9, 2008 & the Court Judgment entered September 25, 2008 are hereby SET ASIDE. Plaintiff shall have ten (10) days leave to file an amended complaint as to Mr. Harney, and to add other defendants.

Counsel for defendant Christopher J. Harney shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than January 13, 2009.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Garret Murai, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Eric F. Anderson, Incorporated, a California corporation dba Five Star Fixtures & Solid Surface.
Geza Paulovits, Vice President of Eric F. Anderson Incorporated, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Wag Hotels, Inc., a Delaware corporation or Christopher J. Harney, an individual.
Default entered against defendant Christopher J. Harney on July 9, 2008.
Default entered against defendant Wag Hotels, Inc. on July 30, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on August 18, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Eric F. Anderson, Incorporated, a California corporation dba Five Star Fixtures & Solid Surface, and against the Defaulted Defendants Wag Hotels, Inc. a Delaware corporation and Christopher J. Harney, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $86,440.37.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,653.44.
Attorney's Fees - $5,521.36.
Costs - $482.00, for a total in the amount of $95,097.17.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
